text.tspan: Flock camera searches: Kenner PD vs. the rest of the network
​Two different y-axis scales: outside agencies (bars, left, peaks ~550,000/month) search ~150x more than Kenner itself (line, right, peaks ~4,300/month).​

g.text: Source: Kenner LA PD FOIA response via MuckRock (Flock audit logs). Full months only: Jan 2024 - Dec 2025. Methodology: results/internal-vs-network/ in the eos-foia-flock-kenner repo.
